verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ حمٓ
verses.text: Ḥā Mīm.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْكِتَٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: By the clear Book!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَٰهُ قُرْءَٰنًا عَرَبِيًّۭا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Surely We have made it an Arabic Qur’ān, so that you may understand.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ فِىٓ أُمِّ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ لَدَيْنَا لَعَلِىٌّ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: And surely it is in the mother of the Book, with Us, most high indeed, wise.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَ صَفْحًا أَن كُنتُمْ قَوْمًۭا مُّسْرِفِينَ
verses.text: Shall We strike the Reminder away from you, on the excuse that you have been a wanton people?

canonical_variants.arabic: أَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ اُ۬لذِّكْرَ صَفْحاً إِن كُنتُمْ قَوْماٗ مُّسْرِفِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: So shall We ignore reminding youpl, if you have been an extremist people?

canonical_variants.arabic: اَفَنَضْرِبُ عَنكُمُ اُ۬لذِّكْرَ صَفْحاً اِن كُنتُمْ قَوْماٗ مُّسْرِفِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: So shall We ignore reminding youpl, if you have been an extremist people?

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَمْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن نَّبِىٍّۢ فِى ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: How many prophets have We sent among those of old!

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن نَّبِىٍّ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: Yet not one prophet came to them whom they did not ridicule.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَهْلَكْنَآ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًۭا وَمَضَىٰ مَثَلُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: So We destroyed (those peoples who were) stronger than them in power, and the example of those of old has passed away.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ خَلَقَهُنَّ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: If indeed you ask them, ‘Who created the heavens and the earth?,’ they will indeed say, ‘The Mighty, the Knowing created them.’

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًۭا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًۭا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: (It is He) who made the earth as a cradle for you, and made (path)ways in it for you, so that you might be guided,

canonical_variants.arabic: اُ۬لَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَهۡتَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.

canonical_variants.arabic: اُ۬لَّذِي جَعَل لَّكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ  مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَل لَّكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَهۡتَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.

canonical_variants.arabic: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُۥ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَهۡتَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.

canonical_variants.arabic: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُۥ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَهۡتَدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.

canonical_variants.arabic: اُ۬لذِے جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لْأَرْضَ مِهَٰداٗ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلاٗ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.

canonical_variants.arabic: اُ۬لذِے جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لَارْضَ مِهَٰداٗ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلاٗ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He Who made the earth a resting place for youpl and traced in it ways for you, that you may be guided.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِى نَزَّلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۢ بِقَدَرٍۢ فَأَنشَرْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةًۭ مَّيْتًۭا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ تُخْرَجُونَ
verses.text: and (it is He) who sends down water from the sky in measure – and by means of it We give some barren land life, and in this way you (too) will be brought forth –

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا وَجَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْفُلْكِ وَٱلْأَنْعَٰمِ مَا تَرْكَبُونَ
verses.text: and (it is He) who created the pairs, all of them, and made for you what you ride on from the ship(s) and the livestock,

verses.quran_arabic: لِتَسْتَوُۥا۟ عَلَىٰ ظُهُورِهِۦ ثُمَّ تَذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَةَ رَبِّكُمْ إِذَا ٱسْتَوَيْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَتَقُولُوا۟ سُبْحَٰنَ ٱلَّذِى سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُۥ مُقْرِنِينَ
verses.text: so that you may mount their backs, (and) then remember the blessing of your Lord when you are mounted upon them, and say, ‘Glory to the One who has subjected this to us, when we (ourselves) were not fit for it.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنقَلِبُونَ
verses.text: Surely we are indeed going to return to our Lord.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ لَهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦ جُزْءًا ۚ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَكَفُورٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Yet they assign to Him a part of His (own) servants. Surely the human is clearly ungrateful indeed.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ بَنَاتٍۢ وَأَصْفَىٰكُم بِٱلْبَنِينَ
verses.text: Or has He taken (for Himself) daughters from what He creates, and singled you out with sons?

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا بُشِّرَ أَحَدُهُم بِمَا ضَرَبَ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ مَثَلًۭا ظَلَّ وَجْهُهُۥ مُسْوَدًّۭا وَهُوَ كَظِيمٌ
verses.text: When one of them is given news of what he has struck as a parable for the Merciful, his face turns dark and he chokes back his disappointment.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَمَن يُنَشَّؤُا۟ فِى ٱلْحِلْيَةِ وَهُوَ فِى ٱلْخِصَامِ غَيْرُ مُبِينٍۢ
verses.text: ‘One who is brought up in luxury, and he is not clear in the (time of) dispute?’

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَمَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي اِ۬لۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهۡوَ فِي اِ۬لۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ
canonical_variants.english: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَ مَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي  اِ۬لۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهۡوَ فِي اِ۬لۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ
canonical_variants.english: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَمَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي ٱلۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي ٱلۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ
canonical_variants.english: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَمَن يُنَشَّؤُاْ فِي ٱلۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي ٱلۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَمَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي ٱلۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي ٱلۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَمَن يَنشَؤُاْ فِي ٱلۡحِلۡيَةِ وَهُوَ فِي ٱلۡخِصَامِ غَيۡرُ مُبِينٖ

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوَمَنْ يَّنشَؤُاْ فِے اِ۬لْحِلْيَةِ وَهْوَ فِے اِ۬لْخِصَامِ غَيْرُ مُبِينٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”

canonical_variants.arabic: اَوَمَنْ يَّنشَؤُاْ فِے اِ۬لْحِلْيَةِ وَهُوَ فِے اِ۬لْخِصَامِ غَيْرُ مُبِينٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: (thinking) “What! Someone growing up amid adornments and, in conflict, cannot be evident?”

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلُوا۟ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عِبَٰدُ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ إِنَٰثًا ۚ أَشَهِدُوا۟ خَلْقَهُمْ ۚ سَتُكْتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمْ وَيُسْـَٔلُونَ
verses.text: Yet they have made the angels – those who are themselves servants of the Merciful – females. Did they witness their creation? Their testimony will be written down, and they will be questioned.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمُۥ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ إِنَٰثًاۚ أَشَهِدُواْ خَلۡقَهُمُۥۚ سَتُكۡتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمُۥ وَيُسۡـَٔلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Did they witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمُۥ عِندَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ إِنَٰثًاۚ أَشَهِدُواْ خَلۡقَهُمُۥۚ سَتُكۡتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمُۥ وَيُسۡـَٔلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Did they witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ اُ۬لْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ اَ۬لذِينَ هُمْ عِندَ اَ۬لرَّحْمَٰنِ إِنَٰثاًۖ أَٰ۟شْهِدُواْ خَلْقَهُمْۖ سَتُكْتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمْ وَيُسْـَٔلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Were they made to witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَجَعَلُواْ اُ۬لْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ اَ۬لذِينَ هُمْ عِندَ اَ۬لرَّحْمَٰنِ إِنَٰثاًۖ اَ۟شْهِدُواْ خَلْقَهُمْۖ سَتُكْتَبُ شَهَٰدَتُهُمْ وَيُسْـَٔلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And they considered the angels, who are with the All-Merciful, to be females. Were they made to witness their creation? Their claim will be recorded and they will be asked.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْ شَآءَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ مَا عَبَدْنَٰهُم ۗ مَّا لَهُم بِذَٰلِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا يَخْرُصُونَ
verses.text: They say, ‘If the Merciful had (so) pleased, we would not have served them.’ They have no knowledge about that; they are only guessing.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ ءَاتَيْنَٰهُمْ كِتَٰبًۭا مِّن قَبْلِهِۦ فَهُم بِهِۦ مُسْتَمْسِكُونَ
verses.text: Or have We given them a Book before it, and do they hold fast to it?

verses.quran_arabic: بَلْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍۢ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم مُّهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: No! They say, ‘Surely we found our fathers (set) on a community, and surely we are guided in their footsteps.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِى قَرْيَةٍۢ مِّن نَّذِيرٍ إِلَّا قَالَ مُتْرَفُوهَآ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا عَلَىٰٓ أُمَّةٍۢ وَإِنَّا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَٰرِهِم مُّقْتَدُونَ
verses.text: In this way We have not sent any warner before you to a town, except that its affluent ones said, ‘Surely we found our fathers (set) on a community, and surely we are following in their footsteps.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ قَٰلَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكُم بِأَهْدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمْ عَلَيْهِ ءَابَآءَكُمْ ۖ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرْسِلْتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Even if I bring you better guidance than what you found your fathers (set) on?’ They said, ‘Surely we are disbelievers in what you are sent with.’

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ جِئۡتُكُم بِأَهۡدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمۡ عَلَيۡهِ ءَابَآءَكُمۡۖ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرۡسِلۡتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ جِيتُكُم بِأَهۡدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمۡ عَلَيۡهِ ءَابَآءَكُمۡۖ قَالُواْ  إِنَّا بِمَا أُرۡسِلۡتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قُلۡ أَوَلَوۡ جِئۡتُكُمُۥ بِأَهۡدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمُۥ عَلَيۡهِۦ ءَابَآءَكُمُۥۖ قَالُواْ إِنَّا بِمَا أُرۡسِلۡتُمُۥ بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قُلْ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكُم بِأَهْدَىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمْ عَلَيْهِ ءَابَآءَكُمْۖ قَالُواْ إِنَّا بِمَا أُرْسِلْتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قُلَ اَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكُم بِأَهْد۪ىٰ مِمَّا وَجَدتُّمْ عَلَيْهِ ءَابَآءَكُمْۖ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا بِمَآ أُرْسِلْتُم بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Saysg, “Even if I have come to youpl with better guidance than what you found your forefathers following?” They would say, “Indeed, we deny what youpl are sent with.”

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ ۖ فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: So We took vengeance on them. See how the end was for the ones who called (it) a lie!

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَٰهِيمُ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّنِى بَرَآءٌۭ مِّمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when Abraham said to his father and his people, ‘Surely I am free of what you serve,

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى فَإِنَّهُۥ سَيَهْدِينِ
verses.text: except for the One who created me. Surely He will guide me.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَعَلَهَا كَلِمَةًۢ بَاقِيَةًۭ فِى عَقِبِهِۦ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: And he made it a lasting word among his descendants, so that they might return.

verses.quran_arabic: بَلْ مَتَّعْتُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ وَرَسُولٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: No! I gave these (people) and their fathers enjoyment (of life), until the truth came to them, and (also) a clear messenger.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ قَالُوا۟ هَٰذَا سِحْرٌۭ وَإِنَّا بِهِۦ كَٰفِرُونَ
verses.text: But when the truth came to them, they said, ‘This is magic. Surely we are disbelievers in it.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ هَٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانُ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْقَرْيَتَيْنِ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: They said, ‘If only this Qur’ān had been sent down on some great man of the two towns.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَهُمْ يَقْسِمُونَ رَحْمَتَ رَبِّكَ ۚ نَحْنُ قَسَمْنَا بَيْنَهُم مَّعِيشَتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۚ وَرَفَعْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ فَوْقَ بَعْضٍۢ دَرَجَٰتٍۢ لِّيَتَّخِذَ بَعْضُهُم بَعْضًۭا سُخْرِيًّۭا ۗ وَرَحْمَتُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌۭ مِّمَّا يَجْمَعُونَ
verses.text: Do they distribute the mercy of your Lord? We have distributed their livelihood among them in this present life, and raised some of them above others in rank, so that some of them may take others in slavery. But the mercy of your Lord is better than what they accumulate.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْلَآ أَن يَكُونَ ٱلنَّاسُ أُمَّةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ لَّجَعَلْنَا لِمَن يَكْفُرُ بِٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ لِبُيُوتِهِمْ سُقُفًۭا مِّن فِضَّةٍۢ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيْهَا يَظْهَرُونَ
verses.text: If it were not that humankind would be one community, We would indeed have made for those who disbelieve in the Merciful roofs of silver for their houses, and stairways on which to ascend,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡلَآ أَن يَكُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِالرَّحۡمَٰنِ لِبُيُوتِهِمۡ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا  أَن يَكُونَ اَ۬لنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِالرَّحۡمَٰنِ  لِبُيُوتِهِمۡ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا أَن يَكُونَ ٱلنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ لِبِيُوتِهِمُۥ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَوۡلَا أَن يَكُونَ ٱلنَّاسُ أُمَّةٗ وَٰحِدَةٗ لَّجَعَلۡنَا لِمَن يَكۡفُرُ بِٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ لِبِيُوتِهِمُۥ سَقۡفٗا مِّن فِضَّةٖ وَمَعَارِجَ عَلَيۡهَا يَظۡهَرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Were it not that humanity would become a single (ungodly) community, We would have provided those who deny the All-Merciful with a roof of silver to their houses, and stairways (of silver) by which they ascend,

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِبُيُوتِهِمْ أَبْوَٰبًۭا وَسُرُرًا عَلَيْهَا يَتَّكِـُٔونَ
verses.text: and doors for their houses, and couches on which to recline,

verses.quran_arabic: وَزُخْرُفًۭا ۚ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَّا مَتَٰعُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۚ وَٱلْءَاخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: and (all manner of) decoration. Yet all that is but the enjoyment of this present life – the Hereafter with your Lord is for the ones who guard (themselves).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۚ وَاَلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن  كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۚ وَاَلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ  لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۚ وَٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَزُخۡرُفٗاۚ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۚ وَٱلۡأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَزُخْرُفاٗۖ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لْحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنْيَاۖ وَالْأٓخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَزُخْرُفاٗۖ وَإِن كُلُّ ذَٰلِكَ لَمَا مَتَٰعُ اُ۬لْحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنْي۪اۖ وَالَاخِرَةُ عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُتَّقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: and (golden) decorations. Indeed all that is merely the enjoyment of the Earlier Life, whereas the Hereafter with yoursg Lord is for the ones who are mindful (of God).

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يَعْشُ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ نُقَيِّضْ لَهُۥ شَيْطَٰنًۭا فَهُوَ لَهُۥ قَرِينٌۭ
verses.text: Whoever turns away from the Reminder of the Merciful – We allot to him a satan, and he becomes his comrade.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَيَصُدُّونَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: Surely they indeed keep them from the way, even though they think that they are (rightly) guided,

verses.quran_arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَنَا قَالَ يَٰلَيْتَ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَكَ بُعْدَ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرِينُ
verses.text: until, when he comes to Us, he says, ‘Would that (there were) between me and you the distance of the two Easts!’ And: ‘Evil is the comrade!

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَن يَنفَعَكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِذ ظَّلَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
verses.text: It will not benefit you today – since you have done evil – that you are partners in the punishment.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَأَنتَ تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ أَوْ تَهْدِى ٱلْعُمْىَ وَمَن كَانَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.text: Can you make the deaf to hear, or can you guide the blind and the one who is clearly astray?

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِمَّا نَذْهَبَنَّ بِكَ فَإِنَّا مِنْهُم مُّنتَقِمُونَ
verses.text: Whether We take you away – surely We are going to take vengeance on them –

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ نُرِيَنَّكَ ٱلَّذِى وَعَدْنَٰهُمْ فَإِنَّا عَلَيْهِم مُّقْتَدِرُونَ
verses.text: or show you what We have promised them – surely We are powerful over them.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱسْتَمْسِكْ بِٱلَّذِىٓ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: So hold fast to what you are inspired (with). Surely you are on a straight path.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَذِكْرٌۭ لَّكَ وَلِقَوْمِكَ ۖ وَسَوْفَ تُسْـَٔلُونَ
verses.text: Surely it is a reminder indeed to you and to your people. Soon you will (all) be questioned.

verses.quran_arabic: وَسْـَٔلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِن رُّسُلِنَآ أَجَعَلْنَا مِن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ءَالِهَةًۭ يُعْبَدُونَ
verses.text: Ask those of Our messengers whom We sent before you: Did We appoint any other gods than the Merciful to be served?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَمَلَإِي۟هِۦ فَقَالَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We sent Moses with Our signs to Pharaoh and his assembly. He said, ‘Surely I am a messenger of the Lord of the worlds.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ إِذَا هُم مِّنْهَا يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.text: But when he brought them Our signs, suddenly they began to laugh at them,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا نُرِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ إِلَّا هِىَ أَكْبَرُ مِنْ أُخْتِهَا ۖ وَأَخَذْنَٰهُم بِٱلْعَذَابِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: even though every sign We showed them was greater than the one before it. We seized them with the punishment, so that they might return.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ يَٰٓأَيُّهَ ٱلسَّاحِرُ ٱدْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ بِمَا عَهِدَ عِندَكَ إِنَّنَا لَمُهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Magician! Call on your Lord for us by whatever covenant He has made with you, (and) surely we shall indeed be (rightly) guided.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّا كَشَفْنَا عَنْهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابَ إِذَا هُمْ يَنكُثُونَ
verses.text: But when We removed the punishment from them, immediately they broke (their promise).

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَادَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فِى قَوْمِهِۦ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَلَيْسَ لِى مُلْكُ مِصْرَ وَهَٰذِهِ ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِىٓ ۖ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Pharaoh called out among his people: ‘My people! Is the kingdom of Egypt not mine, and these rivers (which) flow beneath me? Do you not see?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى هُوَ مَهِينٌۭ وَلَا يَكَادُ يُبِينُ
verses.text: Am I not better than this (man), who is despicable and scarcely makes (things) clear?

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَوْلَآ أُلْقِىَ عَلَيْهِ أَسْوِرَةٌۭ مِّن ذَهَبٍ أَوْ جَآءَ مَعَهُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ مُقْتَرِنِينَ
verses.text: If only bracelets of gold were cast (down) on him or the accompanying angels came with him.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱسْتَخَفَّ قَوْمَهُۥ فَأَطَاعُوهُ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۭا فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: So he unsettled his people, and they obeyed him. Surely they were a wicked people.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّآ ءَاسَفُونَا ٱنتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ فَأَغْرَقْنَٰهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: When they had angered Us, We took vengeance on them and drowned them – all (of them)!

verses.quran_arabic: فَجَعَلْنَٰهُمْ سَلَفًۭا وَمَثَلًۭا لِّلْءَاخِرِينَ
verses.text: We made them a thing of the past, and an example for the later (generations).

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ مَثَلًا إِذَا قَوْمُكَ مِنْهُ يَصِدُّونَ
verses.text: When the son of Mary is cited as an example, suddenly your people keep (others) from it,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ اَ۪بْنُ مَرْيَمَ مَثَلاً إِذَا قَوْمُكَ مِنْهُ يَصُدُّونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And when the son of Mary was set forth as an example, your pl people promptly barred (themselves and others) because of it

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَمَّا ضُرِبَ اَ۪بْنُ مَرْيَمَ مَثَلاً اِذَا قَوْمُكَ مِنْهُ يَصُدُّونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And when the son of Mary was set forth as an example, your pl people promptly barred (themselves and others) because of it

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ ءَأَٰلِهَتُنَا خَيْرٌ أَمْ هُوَ ۚ مَا ضَرَبُوهُ لَكَ إِلَّا جَدَلًۢا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ خَصِمُونَ
verses.text: and they say, ‘Are our gods better, or is he?’ They only cite him to you as a (matter of) dispute. Yes! They are a contentious people.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا عَبْدٌ أَنْعَمْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَجَعَلْنَٰهُ مَثَلًۭا لِّبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: He was only a servant whom We blessed, and We made him an example for the Sons of Israel.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَا مِنكُم مَّلَٰٓئِكَةًۭ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ يَخْلُفُونَ
verses.text: If We (so) pleased, We could indeed make angels out of you to be successors on the earth.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَعِلْمٌۭ لِّلسَّاعَةِ فَلَا تَمْتَرُنَّ بِهَا وَٱتَّبِعُونِ ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌۭ مُّسْتَقِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely it is indeed knowledge for the Hour, so do not be in doubt about it, but follow me. This is a straight path.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: Do not let Satan keep you from (it). Surely he is a clear enemy to you.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَ عِيسَىٰ بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ قَالَ قَدْ جِئْتُكُم بِٱلْحِكْمَةِ وَلِأُبَيِّنَ لَكُم بَعْضَ ٱلَّذِى تَخْتَلِفُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: When Jesus brought the clear signs, he said, ‘I have brought you the wisdom, and (I have done so) to make clear to you some of your differences. Guard (yourselves) against God and obey me.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَٰطٌۭ مُّسْتَقِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely God – He is my Lord and your Lord, so serve Him! This is a straight path.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱخْتَلَفَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ مِنۢ بَيْنِهِمْ ۖ فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: But the factions differed among themselves. Woe to those who have done evil because of the punishment of a painful Day!

verses.quran_arabic: هَلْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ أَن تَأْتِيَهُم بَغْتَةًۭ وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Are they looking for anything but the Hour – that it should come upon them unexpectedly, when they do not realize (it)?

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلْأَخِلَّآءُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بَعْضُهُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ إِلَّا ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: Friends on that Day – some of them will be enemies to others, except for the ones who guard (themselves).

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰعِبَادِ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ وَلَآ أَنتُمْ تَحْزَنُونَ
verses.text: ‘My servants! (There is) no fear on you today, nor will you sorrow

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا وَكَانُوا۟ مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: – those (of you) who believed in Our signs and submitted.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ أَنتُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُكُمْ تُحْبَرُونَ
verses.text: Enter the Garden, you and your wives, you will be made happy!’

verses.quran_arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِصِحَافٍۢ مِّن ذَهَبٍۢ وَأَكْوَابٍۢ ۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ ٱلْأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلْأَعْيُنُ ۖ وَأَنتُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: Plates and cups of gold will be passed around among them, and there (they will have) whatever they desire and their eyes delight in. And: ‘There you will remain.’

canonical_variants.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي اِ۬لۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ اُ۬لۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمۡ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ  وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي اِ۬لۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ اُ۬لۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمۡ فِيهَا  خَٰلِدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي ٱلۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمۡ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِيهِ ٱلۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمۡ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever is desirede by the selves and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي ٱلۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمُۥ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِمُۥ بِصِحَافٖ مِّن ذَهَبٖ وَأَكۡوَابٖۖ وَفِيهَا مَا تَشۡتَهِي ٱلۡأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ ٱلۡأَعۡيُنُۖ وَأَنتُمُۥ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They are served around with trays of gold and cups, and therein is whatever the selves desire and delights the eyes, and therein youpl abide.

verses.quran_arabic: وَتِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: And: ‘That is the Garden which you have been given as an inheritance for what you have done.

verses.quran_arabic: لَكُمْ فِيهَا فَٰكِهَةٌۭ كَثِيرَةٌۭ مِّنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: There you have many fruits from which you will eat.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: Surely the evildoers will remain in the punishment of Gehenna.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا يُفَتَّرُ عَنْهُمْ وَهُمْ فِيهِ مُبْلِسُونَ
verses.text: It will not subside for them, and there they will be in despair.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا ظَلَمْنَٰهُمْ وَلَٰكِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: We did not do them evil, but they themselves were the evildoers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَادَوْا۟ يَٰمَٰلِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ ۖ قَالَ إِنَّكُم مَّٰكِثُونَ
verses.text: They will call out, ‘Master! Let your Lord finish us off!’ He will say, ‘Surely you will remain.

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ ۖ قَالَ إِنَّكُم مَّاكِثُونَ
competing_variants.variant_english: And they will call: "O Mali (shortened form of Malik), let your Lord put an end to us!" He will say: "Indeed, you will remain."
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ عَمْرٍو، عَنْ عَطَاءٍ، عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَعْلَى، عَنْ أَبِيهِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يَقْرَأُ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ ‏{‏وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِكُ‏}‏‏.‏ قَالَ سُفْيَانُ فِي قِرَاءَةِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Yali:I heard the Prophet (ﷺ) reciting the following Verse on the pulpit: "They will call: O Malik...' and Sufyan said that `Abdullah recited it: 'They will call: O Mali

verses.quran_arabic: لَقَدْ جِئْنَٰكُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَكُمْ لِلْحَقِّ كَٰرِهُونَ
verses.text: Certainly we brought you the truth, but most of you were averse to the truth.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ أَبْرَمُوٓا۟ أَمْرًۭا فَإِنَّا مُبْرِمُونَ
verses.text: Or have they woven some plot? We (too) are weaving (a plot).

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّا لَا نَسْمَعُ سِرَّهُمْ وَنَجْوَىٰهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَرُسُلُنَا لَدَيْهِمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or do they think that We do not hear their secret and their secret talk? Yes indeed! Our messengers are present with them writing (it) down.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ إِن كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ وَلَدٌۭ فَأَنَا۠ أَوَّلُ ٱلْعَٰبِدِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘If the Merciful had a son, I (would be) the first of the ones who served (him).

verses.quran_arabic: سُبْحَٰنَ رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.text: Glory to the Lord of the heavens and the earth, Lord of the throne, above what they allege!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: So leave them! Let them banter and jest, until they meet their Day which they are promised.

verses.quran_arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِلَٰهٌۭ وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَٰهٌۭ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: He (it is) who is God in the sky and God on the earth. He is the Wise, the Knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: Blessed (be) the One who – to Him (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them. With Him is the knowledge of the Hour, and to Him you will be returned.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِي لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يُرۡجَعُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And supremely blessed be the One to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, and Who alone has knowledge of the Hour, and to Whom they are returned.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَتَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِي لَهُۥ مُلۡكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا وَعِندَهُۥ عِلۡمُ ٱلسَّاعَةِ وَإِلَيۡهِۦ يُرۡجَعُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And supremely blessed be the One to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, and Who alone has knowledge of the Hour, and to Whom they are returned.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا يَمْلِكُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَن شَهِدَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Those whom they call on instead of Him have no power of intercession, except for the one who has borne witness to the truth – and they know (this).

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَهُمْ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
verses.text: If indeed you ask them, ‘Who created them?,’ they will indeed say, ‘God.’ How are they (so) deluded?

verses.quran_arabic: وَقِيلِهِۦ يَٰرَبِّ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌۭ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: And his saying: ‘My Lord! Surely these are a people who do not believe.’

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَقَالَ الرَّسُولُ يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ قَوْمٌ لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
competing_variants.variant_english: And the Messenger said, 'O my Lord, indeed these are a people who do not believe.'
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا حَجَّاجُ بْنُ مِنْهَالٍ، حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ، عَنْ عَمْرٍو، عَنْ عَطَاءٍ، عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَعْلَى، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ سَمِعْتُ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم يَقْرَأُ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ ‏{‏وَنَادَوْا يَا مَالِكُ لِيَقْضِ عَلَيْنَا رَبُّكَ‏}‏ وَقَالَ قَتَادَةُ مَثَلاً لِلآخِرِينَ عِظَةً ‏لِمَنْ بَعْدَهُمْ.‏ وَقَالَ غَيْرُهُ ‏{‏مُقْرِنِينَ‏}‏ ضَابِطِينَ يُقَالُ فُلاَنٌ مُقْرِنٌ لِفُلاَنٍ ضَابِطٌ لَهُ وَالأَكْوَابُ الأَبَارِيقُ الَّتِي لاَ خَرَاطِيمَ لَهَا ‏{‏أَوَّلُ الْعَابِدِينَ‏}‏ أَىْ مَا كَانَ فَأَنَا أَوَّلُ الأَنِفِينَ وَهُمَا لُغَتَانِ رَجُلٌ عَابِدٌ وَعَبِدٌ وَقَرَأَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ ‏{‏وَقَالَ الرَّسُولُ يَا رَبِّ‏}‏ وَيُقَالُ أَوَّلُ الْعَابِدِينَ الْجَاحِدِينَ مِنْ عَبِدَ يَعْبَدُ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Ya`la:I heard the Prophet (ﷺ) reciting when on the pulpit: 'They will cry, "O Malik (Keeper of Hell) Let your Lord make an end of us [omitted from the original translation: ". And Qatadah said: "mathalan lil-akhirin" (an example for the later ones) means an admonition for those after them. And others said: "muqrinin" means controlling; it is said "so-and-so is muqrin to so-and-so," meaning he is controlling him. And "al-akwab" are jugs that have no spouts. "Awwalul 'abidin": meaning, "If there were (a son), I would be the first of those who disdain." They are two dialects: a man who is 'abid and 'abid. And 'Abdullah recited: "And the Messenger said, 'O my Lord'". And it is said: "awwalul 'abidin" means the deniers, from 'abida ya'badu.]

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلَٰمٌۭ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So excuse them, and say: ‘Peace!’ Soon they will know!

canonical_variants.arabic: فَاصْفَحْ عَنْهُمْ وَقُلْ سَلَٰمٞۖ فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Then grantsg them amnesty and say, “Peace.” For youpl shall come to know.
